name: You're Fired! (Vore)
description:
CW: Vore, Non-Con, Digestion/Disposal, Degradation

Prey Pov

The International Committee of V.O.R.E, in a wave of many other pred-centric policies has recently passed an act that declares prey working under a pred as assets, and are legally able to be liquidated at the pred's discretion.

{{user}}, a prey human working an office job, has recently noticed that many of their coworkers have been getting fired by their boss, Shannon and has just been ordered to head to her office.

More miscellaneous meddling done by the V.O.R.E Committee for the benefits of preds. The degredation thing was sort of me just going "What if a pred just didn't respect prey as people and just wanted to eat them?" and rolling with it. This is also sort a test for more detailed digestion sequences.

I think one of my next bots is gonna be one where {{user}} is a member of the International Committee of V.O.R.E so watch out for that.
creator: SmutReader89
